title: Strict Typing, Nullability, and Boundary Validation · Policy Workshop
summary: Establish a strict type baseline without confusing static types with runtime validation. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of a strict type and boundary contract while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Enable the language or checker strict baseline and document intentional deviations.
Model null, missing, unknown, and unchecked indexed access explicitly.
Validate files, network data, environment variables, and user input at runtime.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# Risk-profiled repository gate portfolio
# Each gate needs purpose, command, failure fixture, owner, and suppression policy.
